ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the respondent */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the respondent resides */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education attained by the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the respondent */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent has any disabilities */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_use_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-use entry */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent who logged the entry */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time in hours:minutes:seconds for the day */,
  "activity_category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., Personal care, Employment) */,
  "activity_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the activity (e.g., Sleep, Eating) */,
  "time_spent" TEXT /* Time spent on the activity in hours:minutes:seconds */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was logged */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time when the entry was logged */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (e.g., Survey, Interview) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_entries_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_use_entries_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Personal care, Work) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category and its significance */,
  "is_primary_category" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is a primary category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory (e.g., Eating, Sleeping) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "is_primary_subcategory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subcategory is a primary subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES activity_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_spent" (
  "time_spent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time spent entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time-use entry */,
  "activity_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated activity category */,
  "time_duration" TEXT /* Duration of time spent in hours:minutes:seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_spent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_spent_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES time_use_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography record */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the respondent's residence */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the respondent lives */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the respondent's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the respondent's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level attained by the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "income" TEXT /* Annual income of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_demographics_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sessions" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study session */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "study_time" TEXT /* Total time spent studying in hours:minutes:seconds */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study activity (e.g., Schoolwork, Homework) */,
  "study_location" TEXT /* Location where the study session took place */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date of the study session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sessions_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leisure_activities" (
  "leisure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leisure activity entry */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the leisure activity (e.g., Sports, Reading) */,
  "time_spent" TEXT /* Time spent on the leisure activity in hours:minutes:seconds */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the leisure activity took place */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the leisure activity took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leisure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leisure_activities_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Survey, Interview) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source and its methodology */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Survey, Interview, Mobile App) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)
